description: The Rect From Min Max node takes in 2 specific float2 values, giving the minimum size of the rect, usually just at the X and Y position, and also needing the max size of this rect, which is usually X + Width and Y + Height. Then this node returns a rect value that has the min and max provided. In contrast to the Rect From Position Size node where it takes the literal position and size to get a rect's bounding data.
